creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
I compiled mongodb 6.0.2 with -g and commented the "strip" commands in the Makefile.
This gives a lot more info. But I'm not a mongodb developer. So help is appreciated.

Thread 1 received signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.
Address not mapped to object.
